description: A close-up shot of a person's hands holding a small pile of coarse, crystalline salt. The hands have light skin with neatly manicured pink nails. A tattoo is visible on the left wrist. The background consists of rough, textured rocks, suggesting an outdoor, possibly coastal or saline environment. The lighting indicates it is daytime.
location_context: Outdoor environment with rocky terrain, possibly near a salt pan or salt flats.
